notes: command not found right after install, first ask; docs-covered setup issue

messages.content: just installed the supabase cli with brew and I get 'zsh: command not found: supabase'

Almost always a PATH issue right after a brew install. Run `brew list supabase` to confirm it installed, then `echo $PATH` — if `/opt/homebrew/bin` isn't in there, your shell isn't picking up brew's bin directory. Can you paste what those two show?
ok one sec, running them now
